evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Implement testing, monitoring, and data quality checks
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Explicit ownership of testing, monitoring, and data quality checks signals governance/quality practice dominating over pure shipping speed, matching rigour.
evidence.domain_risk: Build trusted data products that power smarter decisions
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Data products power business decisions but there is no regulatory, financial-reporting, or compliance stake mentioned, matching moderate risk.
evidence.collaboration_width: data engineers (Partner with data engineers on clean ingestion and upstream design)
evidence.data_team_maturity: Optimize our data platform - especially the analytics layer - for AI use cases
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Optimizing an existing analytics layer for new use cases implies an established stack that is actively being grown and extended, matching mid maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: Optimize warehouse usage through partitioning, clustering, and incremental modeling
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The JD cites specific technical methods (partitioning, clustering, incremental modeling) suggesting hiring-manager input, balanced with more generic framing elsewhere, supporting mixed authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Enable governed self-serve analytics by simplifying access to trusted data sources
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The focus on enabling internal self-serve access to trusted data sources centers the role on serving internal data consumers, matching internal_data orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: Own the analytics layer at MR MARVIS
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The verb 'own' applied to an entire analytics layer signals broad direction-setting responsibility combined with scoped delivery work elsewhere, matching mixed autonomy.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Build robust data pipelines translating complex business logic into scalable dbt models; Optimize models for performance, cost efficiency, and long-term maintainability
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The JD pairs building new pipelines/models with optimizing existing ones for performance and maintainability, combining greenfield build work with fix/scale work, matching mixed.
evidence.ai_role: Optimize our data platform - especially the analytics layer - for AI uses cases
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Candidate builds analytics infrastructure optimized for AI systems to consume.
evidence.testing_framing: Implement testing, monitoring, and data quality checks
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Candidate owns implementation of testing and data quality practices.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Implement testing, monitoring, and data quality checks
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Operational reliability concerns emphasized through monitoring and quality practices.
